paper_title: Teaching language models to support answers with verified quotes

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **GopherCite**, a self-supported question-answering model using **Inline Evidence**—generating answers paired with verbatim quotes from retrieved documents via RLHP and SFT. Leverages Google Search for real-time document retrieval and demonstrates improved plausibility and support metrics (80%/67% on NaturalQuestions/ELI5 subsets) while enabling controlled abstention from uncertain questions
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Gopher base model (280B parameters, unspecified corpus details from Rae et al., 2021)
raw_extraction.application: Fact-checked question answering, explainable AI, user-trustworthy conversational agents
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling trustworthy, verifiable question-answering through evidence-grounded responses
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Self-Supported Question Answering (SQA) via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Human Preferences (RLHP)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Teaching language models to support answers with verified quotes

raw_extraction.innovation: Ablation study testing smaller Gopher variant (1.4B) for SQA capabilities, demonstrating reduced but still effective evidence-grounded responses via RLHP/SFT pipeline
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Gopher base model (1.4B parameters, unspecified corpus details from Rae et al., 2021)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating model scale impact on evidence-grounded question answering
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Self-Supported Question Answering (SQA) via SFT + RLHP (abbreviated ablation study)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Teaching language models to support answers with verified quotes

raw_extraction.innovation: Ablation study testing mid-sized Gopher variant (7B) for SQA capabilities, showing intermediate performance improvements over smaller models via RLHP/SFT
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Gopher base model (7B parameters, unspecified corpus details from Rae et al., 2021)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Model scaling effects on evidence-grounded reasoning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Self-Supported Question Answering (SQA) via SFT + RLHP (abbreviated ablation study)
